_comment: Maps each distinct config/cities.json state string to its ISO 3166-2:IN subregion code, used by src/backfill_trends.py to pull state-level Google Trends history via SerpApi (geo=IN-XX). Keys MUST match cities.json state strings exactly (incl. merged post-2020 UT names). null = no Google Trends subregion; those states' cities inherit the national/disease mean downstream, so null is a safe skip. Codes verified against the SerpApi google_trends geo set; 'Dadra and Nagar Haveli and Daman and Diu' resolved empirically (no working subregion -> null).
